_doc: KARTA projektu drapek v3 (DOKTRYNA 'EDYTUJ PRAWDE') = jedyne zrodlo prawdy. Archetyp gadzet-handsPOV z ANIMAL-AS-PERFORMER (pies = odpowiednik twarzy: kanoniczny dog-ref warunkuje wszystkie sceny z psem, jak face-ref w beauty). Produkt: Drapek — deska do scierania pazurow psa z WSUWANA pokrywa na smakolyki (Ali white-label). Tozsamosc WYLACZNIE z gallery_curated; marka PetSpany ze wzorca = forbidden. v3 KOREKTA PRAWDY (zweryfikowana na packshocie prod-open/prod-closed przez Tomka): (1) GRUBA deska (nie cienki slab); (2) CALY wierzch czarny scierny BEZ ZADNEGO rantu — czern dochodzi do krawedzi, drewno widac TYLKO na BOKACH; (3) pokrywa = OSOBNA, ciensza, MNIEJSZA czarna deseczka z czarna petla na rogu, wysunieta W LEWO czesciowo POZA obrys glownej deski (nachodzi na lewy gorny rog); (4) wneka = kwadrat z jasnymi drewnianymi sciankami, pozycja CENTER-RIGHT wierzchu (v2 blednie: 'left end'). Klatki produktowe = nano-EDYCJA packshotu (piksele prawdy), zmiana stanu = CIECIE, nie animacja.

product.anatomy_str: A solid rectangular dog claw-filing board, about 35 by 25 cm, a THICK chunky slab (a substantial few-centimetres-thick board, NOT paper-thin), with a solid pale natural pine-wood body whose plain blonde wood shows ONLY on the SIDE edges; the ENTIRE flat top face is covered edge-to-edge in one single continuous coarse matte-black grippy abrasive scratch pad with a fine sandpaper/emery texture, the black reaching all the way to the wood side edges with NO wooden rim, NO lip, NO raised frame and NO tray edge anywhere on the top; the treat compartment is a square pale-wooden well recessed INTO the body at the CENTER-RIGHT of the top; it is closed by a SEPARATE, thinner, smaller black-topped sliding lid deck that carries a short black fabric pull-loop at its corner; when opened the lid slides HORIZONTALLY to the LEFT, ending up as a separate flat black deck sitting partly BEYOND the left outline of the main board (overhanging the left-upper corner), which uncovers the pale wooden well at center-right holding a few brown kibble treats; the blonde wood side edges are completely plain and UNBRANDED with no text or logo
product.functional_count: exactly 1 thick solid board with 1 continuous coarse black abrasive top (edge-to-edge, no rim) + 1 SEPARATE thinner smaller black-topped sliding lid deck carrying 1 black fabric pull-loop + 1 pale wooden treat well recessed at center-right - this exact set, identical in every scene, never more, never fewer
product.exactly_one: EXACTLY ONE scratch board in the scene and only ONE dog; a human hand appears only when the action needs it and holds only that one thing (metal clippers OR the black pull-loop OR nothing)
product._cv_reason: produkt = czarna powierzchnia scierna + jasne drewno (neutralny/czarny, maska HSV bezuzyteczna); pies tan/bialy koliduje z drewnem i skora dloni. Licznik egzemplarzy = VLM wiersz-na-klatke.
forbidden_leaks: PetSpany wordmark on the wood edge
any brand name or logo on the wood or board
grey patterned carpet from the reference
raised wooden frame on top of the black surface
wooden rim or lip around the black surface
recessed inner black panel with a wooden border
compartment box sitting on top of the pad
lid lifting up like a hinge or flap
lid tilting or floating above the board
treat well at the far left end or in a corner
treat well in the dead middle
elements: korpus_deski: solid pale natural pine body, a THICK chunky board (few cm thick, NOT paper-thin), plain blonde wood visible ONLY on the side edges, lying flat and level on the floor plane

czarna_powierzchnia: ONE single continuous coarse matte-black abrasive scratch pad covering the ENTIRE top face edge-to-edge to the wood side edges (one uninterrupted surface, NO wooden rim/lip/frame/tray-edge on top, not split panels)

pokrywa_osobna_wysuw_lewo: a SEPARATE, thinner, smaller black-topped sliding lid deck (its own flat black rectangle) that in the OPEN state is slid to the LEFT partly BEYOND the board's left outline (overhanging the left-upper corner) - NOT a raised wooden frame, NOT a box/panel resting on top, NEVER hinged or lifted
petla: one short black fabric pull-loop at the corner of the separate sliding lid deck

wneka_center_right: a square pale wooden treat well recessed INTO the body at the CENTER-RIGHT of the top (revealed only when the lid is slid left) - NOT at the far edge, NOT in a corner, NOT in the dead middle
smakolyki: a few brown kibble cube treats resting inside the pale wooden well (visible only when open)
bez_marki: blonde wood side edges completely plain and unbranded, zero text, logo or wordmark anywhere

packshots._doc: kotwice prawdy do kompozytow side-by-side i identity_board (0i). closed = pokrywa flush zamknieta (szew+petla); open = pokrywa wysunieta w bok + wneka; lifestyle = realny wysuw z karma (JEDYNY obraz dzialania).

mechanism_states._doc: PASZPORT MECHANIZMU: obraz-ref per STAN. Kazda generacja klatki dostaje ref WLASCIWEGO stanu; last() ZAWSZE dostaje [first, ref_stanu]. mech-open wyciety z lifestyle-demo (realny wysuw z karma).

scenography.layout: one canonical bright airy home living-room floor: warm light-oak wood flooring or a soft cream/beige low-pile rug, a light neutral (cream/beige) sofa softly blurred in the background, tidy and clean; the scratch board lies FLAT and level on the floor in the front-center of frame with the treat lid always at its LEFT end
scenography.swiatlo: bright natural daytime window light, warm and clean, high-key, soft gentle shadows, cheerful cozy home mood - deliberately NOT the dark reference room

action_steps: a hand brings shiny metal nail clippers toward the dog's front paw; the dog pulls its paw back and turns its head away with ears pinned back (anxiety)
a hand sets the thick flat scratch board down level on the floor in front of the curious dog, lid flush-closed over the center-right well

a hand grips the black pull-loop and slides the SEPARATE black lid deck HORIZONTALLY to the LEFT, out past the board's left outline, uncovering the pale wooden well at CENTER-RIGHT with brown kibble (this state change is shown as a CUT closed->open, never an animated hinge)

the dog drags a front paw DOWN and back across the coarse black abrasive top / the slid-out black lid deck, claws scratching, leaving fine pale-grey scuff streaks, while the uncovered well with kibble sits at center-right
the dog dips its nose into the open center-right well and takes a treat
the dog rests a front paw calmly on the scratched black board beside the open well
grammar.both_hands: only ONE human hand appears at a time and only in the clipper / board-placing / lid-gripping scenes; in the scratch and treat-eating scenes there is NO human hand in frame, only the dog; the dog scratches with its FRONT paws only (alternating), front legs on the board, hind legs on the floor
grammar.physics: the thick board lies FLAT and level on the floor plane (a solid chunky slab, never a steep wedge, never a tray with a rim); the dog scratches with real canine paw mechanics - a front paw drags down and back across the flat black abrasive top, claws contacting the surface; the SEPARATE lid deck moves HORIZONTALLY within the floor plane, sliding to the LEFT past the outline, and NEVER lifts, floats, tilts up or hinges (state change is a CUT, not a continuous animation); the uncovered well is a recess in the body at center-right; treats rest in the wooden well under gravity; the dog always has exactly four legs, four paws, one tail, two ears - never an extra limb or paw; clippers are gripped by human fingers, never floating; no full 360 spins, the rigid board stays perfectly still and sharp

identity.dog_desc: one canonical tri-color Pembroke Welsh Corgi: tan/fawn face and legs, white chest, blaze and paws, a black saddle over the back, large upright pointed ears, short legs, fox-like face, dark friendly eyes, black nose, no collar - THE SAME individual dog in every scene

screens_and_text: no readable text, logos, brand names, wordmarks or captions anywhere; the blonde wood edge is plain with NO wordmark (scrub PetSpany); the treat well contains only plain brown kibble; wide illegible small text is fine, any legible glyph = reject
